mapper.select: select detail_id, reimb_id, expense_type, expense_date, expense_amount, expense_desc, receipt_url from oa_reimbursement_detail where reimb_id = #{reimbId} order by detail_id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into oa_reimbursement_detail (reimb_id, expense_type, expense_date, expense_amount, expense_desc, receipt_url, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.reimbId}, #{item.expenseType}, #{item.expenseDate}, #{item.expenseAmount}, #{item.expenseDesc}, #{item.receiptUrl}, #{item.createBy}, now())
